title: stelis coripatae
intro: Stelis coripatae, also known as the orchid Stelis, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Native to Peru, this orchid is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis coripatae include treating fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, as well as providing antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Stelis coripatae can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its usage and efficacy should be researched further.
